$description: Tag / chip component tokens — outlined, uppercase category labels. The deliberate inverse of the badge: where the badge is a filled pill for status, the tag is a square-cornered (radius.sm), transparent-filled, bordered label for skills, categories, and metadata. Two emphasis levels map to neutral semantic foreground roles; both text pairings are verified WCAG AA on the base canvas, and both borders are visible on the page canvas (border.default is intentionally avoided — it matches background.alt and disappears on the canvas).

tag.$description: Outlined uppercase tag/chip. Square corners and a transparent fill distinguish it from the filled pill badge. Use for non-interactive skill, category, or metadata labels — not status. The bare tag (default variant) is the prominent treatment so it reads correctly standalone on the canvas.

default.$description: Standard tag — visible outline, the everyday treatment that reads correctly standalone on the page canvas (matches the skill-tag style on riverromney.design).

background.$description: Transparent fill — the tag reads as an outlined label, not a solid chip.

foreground.$description: Secondary text — foreground.alt (#A0A89A). Contrast vs canvas: 8.0:1 AA.

border.$description: Muted-foreground border (#8B9683) — clearly visible on the page canvas. border.default is deliberately avoided here: it equals background.alt (#1E241E) and disappears against the canvas.

subtle.$description: Quiet tag — lower-emphasis treatment for dense or secondary contexts where the standard tag would be too loud.

background.$description: Transparent fill — outlined label, same as default.

foreground.$description: Tertiary text — foreground.muted (#8B9683). Contrast vs canvas: 6.3:1 AA.

border.$description: Raised-surface edge (#2E3A2E) — subtle but still perceptible on the canvas, a quieter outline than the default tag.

radius.$description: Small 4px radius — square-cornered, the inverse of the badge's full pill. Signals a label/category rather than a status pill.

x.$description: Horizontal padding — 8px. Tighter than the badge pill; suits compact uppercase labels.

y.$description: Vertical padding — 4px. Keeps the tag compact; height is driven by font size.
